name: @com-junkawasaki/svgraph
description: Browser-only SVGraph editor and SVG to PresentationML/PPTX converter.

scripts.check:package: node -e "import('./docs/app.js').then((m) => { for (const name of ['buildSVGraph','buildSVGraphSidecar','svgToDrawingMl','drawingMlToSvg','svgToPptx','initSVGraphEditor','assistantPatchProposal','buildSVGraphAssistantPrompt','parseAssistantPatchProposal','validateAssistantPatch','assistantPatchDiff','applyAssistantPatch']) if (typeof m[name] !== 'function') throw new Error(name); if (!Array.isArray(m.assistantAllowedOps)) throw new Error('assistantAllowedOps'); })" && mkdir -p tmp && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs --version && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs svg2dml examples/sample.svg > tmp/package-smoke.xml && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg tmp/package-smoke.xml > tmp/package-smoke.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/group.dml > tmp/package-group.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/freeform.dml > tmp/package-freeform.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/picture.dml > tmp/package-picture.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/preset.dml > tmp/package-preset.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/alpha.dml > tmp/package-alpha.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/color.dml > tmp/package-color.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/fill-effects.dml > tmp/package-fill-effects.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/line-style.dml > tmp/package-line-style.svg && node -e "import('node:fs').then((fs) => { const group = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-group.svg', 'utf8'); if (!group.includes('transform=\"matrix(2 0 0 2 10 20)\"')) throw new Error(group); const freeform = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-freeform.svg', 'utf8'); if (!freeform.includes('<polygon') || !freeform.includes('fill=\"#f97316\"')) throw new Error(freeform); const picture = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-picture.svg', 'utf8'); if (!picture.includes('<image') || !picture.includes('opacity=\"0.35\"') || !picture.includes('preserveAspectRatio=\"xMidYMid slice\"') || !picture.includes('transform=\"rotate(30 20 25) translate(20 25) scale(-1 1) translate(-20 -25)\"')) throw new Error(picture); const preset = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-preset.svg', 'utf8'); if (!preset.includes('<polygon') || !preset.includes('points=\"30,20 50,40 10,40\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"70,20 80,30 70,40 60,30\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"120,20 160,20 160,36.4 150,40 140,37.6 130,40 120,36.4\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"170,20 200,20 210,30 200,40 170,40 180,30\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"227,20 233,20 233,27 240,27 240,33 233,33 233,40 227,40 227,33 220,33 220,27 227,27\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"260,20 262.4,27.6 270,27.6 263.8,31.8 266.2,40 260,34.4 253.8,40 256.2,31.8 250,27.6 257.6,27.6\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"280,25 306,25 306,20 320,30 306,40 306,35 280,35\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"330,20 370,20 354.8,31.6 354.8,40 345.2,40 345.2,31.6\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"380,23.6 388,26 388,20 412,20 412,26 420,23.6 416,30 420,36.4 412,34 412,40 388,40 388,34 380,36.4 384,30\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"450,20 470,25 460,25 460,28 470,28 470,32 460,32 460,40 440,40 440,32 430,32 430,28 440,28 440,25 430,25\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"490,30 490,20 491.3053,20.0856') || !preset.includes('points=\"520,20 523.8268,20.7612 527.0711,22.9289') || !preset.includes('points=\"550,20 551.2,27.2 555.8,22 553.6,28.6') || !preset.includes('<rect x=\"570\" y=\"20\" width=\"40\" height=\"20\" rx=\"3.3333\" ry=\"3.3333\" fill=\"#fde2e2\"') || !preset.includes('<ellipse cx=\"630\" cy=\"30\" rx=\"10\" ry=\"10\" fill=\"#cffafe\"') || !preset.includes('<rect x=\"650\" y=\"20\" width=\"40\" height=\"20\" rx=\"3.3333\" ry=\"3.3333\" fill=\"#dbeafe\"')) throw new Error(preset); const alpha = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-alpha.svg', 'utf8'); if (!alpha.includes('fill-opacity=\"0.5\"') || !alpha.includes('stroke-opacity=\"0.25\"') || !alpha.includes('stroke-width=\"2\"')) throw new Error(alpha); const color = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-color.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['fill=\"#99b2cc\"','stroke=\"#223962\"','fill=\"#336699\"','fill=\"#339999\"','fill=\"#112233\"','stroke=\"#555e66\"','fill=\"#3cb371\"','stroke=\"#804600\"','fill=\"#f5f5f5\"']) if (!color.includes(expected)) throw new Error(color); const effects = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-fill-effects.svg', 'utf8'); if (!effects.includes('fill=\"#800080\"') || !effects.includes('fill-opacity=\"0.75\"') || !effects.includes('stroke=\"#004000\"') || !effects.includes('stroke-opacity=\"0.75\"')) throw new Error(effects); const lineStyle = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-line-style.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['stroke-linecap=\"round\"','stroke-linejoin=\"round\"','stroke-dasharray=\"4 3 1 3\"','stroke-linecap=\"square\"','stroke-linejoin=\"miter\"','stroke-dasharray=\"4 2\"','stroke-miterlimit=\"6\"']) if (!lineStyle.includes(expected)) throw new Error(lineStyle); })" && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs svgraph examples/sample.svg > tmp/package-svgraph.json
